# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- 

## Non-goals

- 

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Added or updated architecture decision record when needed
- [ ] Added or updated blueprint when needed
- [ ] Major folders or modules explain AI ownership and collaboration
- [ ] The change is understandable without previous chat context

## Verification

- [ ] Repository health check passes
- [ ] No product code was added without a blueprint
- [ ] No dependencies were added without documented rationale
- [ ] No secrets or private values were committed

## Risk

Describe rollout, migration, security or maintainability risks.
